name: libsoftware-license-perl
title: libsoftware-license-perl
description:
module providing templated software licenses
Software::License is a Perl module used by various tools for module building,
installation, and distribution to provide a simple way of referencing popular
free and open-source software licenses.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libsoftware-license-perl because module providing templated software licenses.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libsoftware-license-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libsoftware-license-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libsoftware-license-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
